programme.title: The Mystery of the Missing Pteranodon
programme.desc: When an inflatable Pteranodon goes missing from the roof of Pizzamat, Addison and Alex are on the case to find it.

programme.title: Orca Baby
programme.desc: Morgan, the deaf orca, is about to give birth to her very first calf. The stakes are high, and the staff at Loro Parque are holding their collective breath as the scene is set for the greatest natural phenomenon in the zoo's history.

programme.title: The Flying Competition
programme.desc: One day Riwahl shows up and challenges Sprinter to a duel. Leo suggests that they have a flying competition to see who the best flyer is. Now, we are going to find out once and for all who's the best.

programme.title: Orca Baby
programme.desc: Morgan, the deaf orca, is about to give birth to her very first calf. The stakes are high, and the staff at Loro Parque are holding their collective breath as the scene is set for the greatest natural phenomenon in the zoo's history.

programme.title: Panama
programme.desc: Panama City adventure: Explored the iconic Panama Canal, rainforest boat ride, aerial tram above treetops, learned the traditional cumbia dance, and explored the cultural gems of Casco Viejo with local teens. A week of diverse experiences in Central America!

programme.title: Invisiboy!
programme.desc: Bored, Robbie visits Motor and secretly takes his invisibility helmet. Now invisible, he pranks everyone! But soon he realizes being unseen isn't so fun after all. The helmet's locked, and he needs help-how do you take off something no one can see... or reach?

programme.title: Trade Route
programme.desc: Howler and Little Lewis take us on an excursion down the medieval trade routes. The journey is anything but a walk in the park for these two wine merchants! In the Middle Ages, being a salesman takes a lot of guts!

programme.title: May the Force Be With You
programme.desc: Eric learns about tiny electrons and how they are connected to creating static electricity. Then he rubs his head with a balloon to create his own static electricity, and uses this to move an object without touching it.

programme.title: Bird Kite
programme.desc: What makes a kite stay in the sky? We'll explain all with this playful paper poultry!

programme.title: May the Force Be With You
programme.desc: Eric learns about tiny electrons and how they are connected to creating static electricity. Then he rubs his head with a balloon to create his own static electricity, and uses this to move an object without touching it.

programme.title: The Missing
programme.desc: The Nektons find the Dark Orca pirate submarine completely deserted! But why? And what are those mysterious, ghostly sounds?

programme.title: It's So Dice
programme.desc: In this episode Eric presents an amazing dice trick: Just by looking at a tower of any number of dice, he can accurately calculate the sum of the hidden faces. How does he do it? And, is it magic ... or is it math?!

programme.title: A Singing Dog
programme.desc: Tilly, the dog, needs an operation to sort her wonky legs. The Junior Vets are checking Blue's teeth, and Johnny and Inel discover a singing dog and help the owner of an angry bird.

programme.title: Orca Baby
programme.desc: Morgan, the deaf orca, is about to give birth to her very first calf. The stakes are high, and the staff at Loro Parque are holding their collective breath as the scene is set for the greatest natural phenomenon in the zoo's history.

programme.title: A Day in the Life of Jorge
programme.desc: As Loro Parque's head vet, Jorge never knows from one day to the next what will come through his clinic. Javier, Loro Parque's Head of Environmental Affairs, is hitting the high seas of Tenerife with a turtle tracker in hand to help with scientific research.

programme.title: Tournaments
programme.desc: In the Middle Ages, tournaments are all the rage! When Howler's behavior is interpreted of that as a crazed fan, he unwittingly finds himself in the shoes of a knight, embarking on a wild joust!

programme.title: A Day in the Life of Jorge

programme.title: Gone Viral
programme.desc: Naomi's makeup blog is a hit, driving Carol and Motor crazy-Carol wants the internet used for good, Motor wants more views on his game page. A viral video contest begins, and even Robbie joins. But in the end, a surprise player creates the video that truly goes viral.

programme.title: Cousin
programme.desc: Robbie's been lying to his cool cousin Bobbie for years to impress him. Now Bobbie's visiting, and Robbie must convince his friends to play along-Carol as his girlfriend, Motor as his best friend, Albert as his bodyguard. But is Bobbie really who he claims to be?

programme.title: Sensational Solubles!
programme.desc: Eric is not sure what soluble means. To find out, he makes a snow globe and compares things that are soluble in water with things that are not.

programme.title: The Day Henry Met....a Submarine
programme.desc: Henry meets a submarine dry docked at the harbour. Submarine wants to become a famous explorer and find the lost city of Atlantis.

programme.title: Squirrel
programme.desc: Grey is super excited to see squirrels on TV. Grandad Badger is not too impressed by the eating habits of the squirrels. And Mommy and Daddy Owl are amazed to discover that the squirrels' incisor teeth never stop growing.

programme.title: E5 - Deadly Rivals
programme.desc: Enter the world of a wild dog pack whose bountiful hunting grounds are threatened when a clan of spotted hyenas moves in nearby. The vulnerable pups start to go hungry as the scavenging rivals steal their food and eventually raid their den.

programme.title: E6 - Buffalo Showdown
programme.desc: To the lion, the buffalo is not only a satisfying dinner but also dangerous. Track a herd of 300 buffalo along with the Mwamba pride, who must act quickly and carefully if they are to take down their prey.

programme.title: Woodpeckers: The Hole Story
programme.desc: March to the steady drumbeat of a unique avian family. Learn why the world’s 239 woodpecker species, from massive to minute, are nature’s best lumberjacks; explore their flying, climbing, and calling skills; and get a look inside their secret nests.

programme.title: E2 - Gardens in the Clouds
programme.desc: The plants and animals of the Cloud Mountains have long captured our imagination. In a landscape defined by weather and threatened by invaders, see how indigenous forests survive by providing a sanctuary for life while opening a door to the past.

programme.title: E1 - Waterhole
programme.desc: Witness clashes over precious resources when the dry season brings a band of gladiators to an African savannah watering hole. See a lion-elephant territory brawl, an ant raid on a termite mound, and a honey badger’s risky dance with a deadly snake.

programme.title: Focus[Live]
programme.desc: Keep up with the latest news from all over the globe with Focus on France 24. Focus programme provides exclusive reports from Monday to Friday at 7.50 am Paris time. Find out what's going on in the world of economy, politics, culture, sport, medicine, ecology. Focus has it all covered for you. programme.title: E15
programme.desc: To strike back at the Asakura and Azai clans, Oda Nobunaga calls on Ashikaga Yoshiaki and Tokugawa Ieyasu (Matsushita Kouhei) for military support. Yet their response is slow, as they secretly hope for Nobunaga's downfall. Meanwhile, Koichiro and Tokichiro try to buy time to help Ichi escape, but her heart remains with Azai Nagamasa, and their plan fails. As Nobunaga advances into northern Omi, the armies of Asakura and Azai face him across the Anegawa River, and the moment of battle arrives.

programme.title: E2 - JJ's Big Pretend Play Dance Party!
programme.desc: Use your imagination at JJ's big pretend play dance party! Join Cody, Nina & Bella as they pretend to explore all sorts of fun places, from outer space to the bottom of the ocean. The fun continues as everyone learns how to do the robot dance to a beep-boop beat! Then, get into your pajamas for a slumber party where you can jump, wiggle & shuffle. With fun exercise moves & graceful ballet steps, it's a dance party where you can be anything you want!

programme.title: E6 - Digging into Earth Week
programme.desc: Get ready to dig into Earth Week with CoComelon! Cody helps Mom with backyard chores using his cool digger toy. Then, Ms. Appleberry helps the class start their own garden! Watch them plant seeds, water them & harvest delicious pumpkins, carrots & tomatoes. The nature fun continues as JJ counts apples at the farm, learns about composting & goes on a beautiful mountain nature walk with Bingo!

programme.title: E2 - From Mail To Outer Space!
programme.desc: Blippi is on adventures big & small, from the mail to outer space! First, Blippi shrinks down to go inside the BlippiMobile's engine to fix a problem. Then, he follows a letter he wrote on its entire journey through the post office to Grandpa Blippi’s mailbox! After that, he flies into outer space on a rocket, floating in zero gravity & performing a space walk. He even joins a boulder on its exciting trip down a river to become a grain of sand!

programme.title: E3 - Earth Week: Saving The Planet
programme.desc: Let's save the planet with Lellobee City Farm! Ella, Mei & Rishi clean up the pond to make a happy home for the animals. Then, they sing a song about recycling trash! The Earth Week fun continues as they demonstrate litter picking & composting. Plus, learn about bumblebees, make a home for a hedgehog & watch the beautiful nocturnal animals come out at night!

programme.title: E6 - Digging into Earth Week
programme.desc: Get ready to dig into Earth Week with CoComelon! Cody helps Mom with backyard chores using his cool digger toy. Then, Ms. Appleberry helps the class start their own garden! Watch them plant seeds, water them & harvest delicious pumpkins, carrots & tomatoes. The nature fun continues as JJ counts apples at the farm, learns about composting & goes on a beautiful mountain nature walk with Bingo!

programme.title: E1 - Twinkle's Most Magical Moments!
programme.desc: Join Twinkle the star for her most magical moments! When Max, Muffin & Bao Bao build a toy train, Twinkle transforms into a real train & takes the kids on a ride all around the house! Then, when Max pretends he's a wizard, Twinkle turns into a magic wand to make his magic real! Her powers continue as she brings fruits & veggies to life for a puppet show & turns into a giant wibbly-wobbly jelly for everyone to play on! It's always magical with Twinkle!

programme.title: E3 - Earth Week: Saving The Planet
programme.desc: Let's save the planet with Lellobee City Farm! Ella, Mei & Rishi clean up the pond to make a happy home for the animals. Then, they sing a song about recycling trash! The Earth Week fun continues as they demonstrate litter picking & composting. Plus, learn about bumblebees, make a home for a hedgehog & watch the beautiful nocturnal animals come out at night!

programme.title: E1 - Epic Rescues & Weasel's Fails!
programme.desc: Get ready for epic rescues & Mr. Weasel's hilarious fails! The chaos begins when Weasel fills Max the Monster Truck's tires with helium, causing him to float away & forcing Gecko to perform a sky-high rescue! Then, Weasel's plan to give Molly extra bouncy springs goes wrong, & Gecko has to help her stop bouncing. The rescues continue when Weasel's new electro-magnet sucks up Baby Truck & the Mechanicals, & Gecko has to save the day!

programme.title: E16
programme.desc: 《一閃一閃亮星星》講述了林北星意外刪除舊手機中的短信回到過去，重新認識了昔日陌路校友張萬森，從而展開一段奇妙的時空拯救之旅的故事。

programme.title: E16
programme.desc: 《一閃一閃亮星星》講述了林北星意外刪除舊手機中的短信回到過去，重新認識了昔日陌路校友張萬森，從而展開一段奇妙的時空拯救之旅的故事。

programme.title: E11
programme.desc: 程家女名少商，因戰亂自幼被父母留在祖母身邊成為“留守兒童”，嬸孃狼心縱容，意圖將其養成廢人。面對重重陷阱，程少商（趙露思飾）為活命，假荒誕、真苦學，掩蓋鋒芒等待父母歸來。可撥開烏雲見月明時，卻因多年疏離致使親情已難再拾。缺愛的程少商，遇新帝義子凌不疑（吳磊飾）、白鹿山才子袁慎、世家子弟樓垚，三人各有優劣。在選擇適婚者上，程少商既自卑又務實，儘管情感之路頗多坎坷，但她從不後悔自己的每次選擇。在與凌不疑的相處之中，也陰差陽錯捲入了凌不疑的家庭與身世之謎中。種種事件，程少商屢立奇功，也從凌不疑的家庭關係中學會與父母相處之道，以及如何經營自己的愛情。同時程少商與凌不疑也在這些經歷中各自變化成長，慢慢與自己和家庭和解，並堅守內心的正義，攜手化解國家危機，成就一段佳話。

programme.desc: 《一閃一閃亮星星》講述了林北星意外刪除舊手機中的短信回到過去，重新認識了昔日陌路校友張萬森，從而展開一段奇妙的時空拯救之旅的故事。

programme.title: E11
programme.desc: 程家女名少商，因戰亂自幼被父母留在祖母身邊成為“留守兒童”，嬸孃狼心縱容，意圖將其養成廢人。面對重重陷阱，程少商（趙露思飾）為活命，假荒誕、真苦學，掩蓋鋒芒等待父母歸來。可撥開烏雲見月明時，卻因多年疏離致使親情已難再拾。缺愛的程少商，遇新帝義子凌不疑（吳磊飾）、白鹿山才子袁慎、世家子弟樓垚，三人各有優劣。在選擇適婚者上，程少商既自卑又務實，儘管情感之路頗多坎坷，但她從不後悔自己的每次選擇。在與凌不疑的相處之中，也陰差陽錯捲入了凌不疑的家庭與身世之謎中。種種事件，程少商屢立奇功，也從凌不疑的家庭關係中學會與父母相處之道，以及如何經營自己的愛情。同時程少商與凌不疑也在這些經歷中各自變化成長，慢慢與自己和家庭和解，並堅守內心的正義，攜手化解國家危機，成就一段佳話。

programme.title: E16
programme.desc: 《一閃一閃亮星星》講述了林北星意外刪除舊手機中的短信回到過去，重新認識了昔日陌路校友張萬森，從而展開一段奇妙的時空拯救之旅的故事。

programme.title: E9
programme.desc: 潘岩(郭麒麟 飾)在機緣巧合下進入榮柯律所實習，認識了高冷女神左娜(金晨 飾)、學霸舒一南(晏紫東 飾)等一批年輕人。他們在資深前輩易帆(朱珠飾)、杜飛宇(張子賢飾)等人的帶領下，經歷了職場的波折坎坷和困難考驗，一起並肩作戰，互相學習成長，憑著熱情拼搏的職場精神，在情與法、義與利的境地裡突圍，更堅定了對法律的崇高信仰，同時也對自身的突破與飛躍有了新的認識與感悟，於職場和生活的路上守望初心，在平凡中創造不凡的「奮逗」故事。

programme.title: E7 - 全員同心同體解鎖身心默契
programme.desc: 重磅打造的全明星爆笑旅行遊戲真人秀，由黃曉明、黃子韜、劉耀文、邵子恆、王鶴棣、于洋組成「宇宙爆閃團」，用高能抽象任務，打造解壓式快樂體驗，去有趣的地方做有意義的事；放下偶像包袱，發送獨一無二的快樂訊號。

programme.title: E20 - 最high男嘉賓登場
programme.desc: 《非誠勿擾》全新改版，24位女嘉賓分為心動區和觀察區，男嘉賓暫不亮相，在「第二現場」與女嘉賓隔空對話。男女嘉賓通過雙向選擇，決定兩人能否成功牽手。

programme.title: E3 - 地球團遊羅馬
programme.desc: 由劉宇寧、龔俊、孫紅雷、李乃文、陳赫、陳星旭、王玉雯、歐陽娣娣組成爆笑「地球團」，沿著地球脈絡從中國出發，感受北緯40度的煙火氣，通過遊戲任務解鎖各地文化與美食，用新鮮有趣的方式，探索全世界的同頻快樂。

programme.title: E1 - 高瀚宇周震南抬價上頭被反殺
programme.desc: 30組新銳潮玩設計師帶著自己的原創IP，與高瀚宇、何廣智、賴美雲、謝可寅、周揚青、周震南組成3組潮玩工作室，經歷一系列主題創作，在創意與設計中不斷挑戰自我、團結協作，用繪畫表達語言，賦予這些潮流新興IP更具生命力的藝術價值，也讓更多「隱藏款」原創IP和寶藏設計師被看到。

programme.title: E7
programme.desc: 專為資深單身人士定制的相親交友節目，每集有4位男嘉賓和3位女嘉賓，依序進行一對一交流。未上場嘉賓則分別在男女嘉賓室觀察場上溝通情況，加深對有意對象的瞭解。節目主張為愛回歸，愛情不分年齡，緣來從來不晚。

programme.title: E3 - 地球團遊羅馬

programme.title: E9 - Weekend In Dijon
programme.desc: With its cobbled streets and medieval buildings, Dijon, capital of the Dukes of Burgundy, offers an enchanting setting steeped in both tradition and modernity. At the heart of Burgundy's wine-growing region, this historic town invites you to take a trip full of discoveries.

programme.title: Movie Craftsmen -Cheung Siu Fai
programme.desc: Cheung Siu Fai, who started his career in television, won the appreciation of director Johnnie To with his precise and solid performance and participated in hit films such as “Running On Karma”, “Election” and “Exiled”. In this episode, Siu Fai is invited to disassemble the design of his classic characters, talk about his friend-and-mentor-like relationship with Johnnie To and share his steadily progressing acting career.

programme.title: Mrs. K
programme.desc: Mrs. K is a housewife who lives in a quiet suburban neighborhood with her husband Mr. K and their daughter Lil' K. One day, a Macau ex-cop shows up to blackmail Mrs. K. He knows about her unseemly past. She agrees to his term and they meet. The deal goes sour as she attempts to get rid of him. He escapes and is captured by a stranger. After finding out why Ex-cop is mixed up in this, the stranger kills him. They are after Mrs. K for different reasons. Ex-cop is someone who stumbles upon Mrs. K's identity and decides to try his luck. The stranger, however, bears a grudge against Mrs. K. Things would date back more than ten years ago when a Macau casino was robbed. The robbery was carried out by a band of professionals and was led by none other than Mrs. K...

programme.title: E113 - #SecretSafe
programme.desc: Sam opens a safe in her bedroom and discovers a tunnel that leads to a secret room. Cat films herself for 24 hours so that her future self can watch it 10-years from now.

programme.title: E112 - Pearl Wants to Be a Star / Super Sitters
programme.desc: Pearl stars in a guest appearance on The Patrick Show. // Patrick and SpongeBob go back in time to watch Mermaid Man and Barnacle Boy when they were new.

programme.title: E301 - Tripped!
programme.desc: Everyone in the family has been working hard to save up for a family vacation. But while road tripping to their destination, everything that can go for the family wrong does.

programme.title: E115 - The Great Ping-Pong Scam
programme.desc: Tori discovers that her friends have been secretly going to a fancy restaurant instead of playing in an annual ping pong tournament.

programme.title: E603 - Flip This Flip / Haunted House Call
programme.desc: The Loud kids help Flip clean up his image to impress his middle school crush. // When the Mortician's Club can't afford tickets to Casket Con, they decide to start a business to raise money.

programme.title: E603 - Flip This Flip / Haunted House Call
programme.desc: The Loud kids help Flip clean up his image to impress his middle school crush. // When the Mortician's Club can't afford tickets to Casket Con, they decide to start a business to raise money.

programme.title: E532 - Theranos Boot
programme.desc: Henry and the other kids destroy Ray's prized movie prop, The Theranos Boot. To replace it, Henry and Jasper travel to an alternate universe Man Cave using Bill Evil's inter-dimensional transporter and steal their Theranos Boot before Ray finds out.

programme.title: E113 - Nitwit Neighborhood News / The Patrick Show MidSeason Finale
programme.desc: Patrick and Squidina report the news around Bikini Bottom. // The Patrick Show presents the epic conclusion to the first half of its first season.

programme.title: E250 - Broken Alarm / Karen's Baby
programme.desc: SpongeBob breaks his precious alarm clock, but nothing else is loud enough to wake him up on time. // Karen quickly learns that kids grow up too fast after her new child arrives in the mail.

programme.title: E203 - A Cyborg Among Us
programme.desc: After the entire Man's Nest is launched into outer space, Danger Force must safely land the ship back on Earth before Rick Twitler and his army of Living Sentient Computer Viruses overtake the world and destroy the internet forever.

programme.title: E303 - Roadie to Nowhere / A Fridge Too Far
programme.desc: After learning that Chunk was like her in high school, Luna worries her ambition to be a rocker is unrealistic. // When food Lincoln has saved in the fridge gets taken, a territory war in the fridge ensues.

programme.title: E308 - UpWard
programme.desc: Lady Upturn introduces Squidward, and his musical 'talents', to her high society friends after she becomes his patron.

programme.title: E210 - The Real Woori World
programme.desc: Min tries to avoid the usual Woori World chaos, but when the family splits up they all get lost in their own fiascos.

programme.title: E322 - Driving Ambition
programme.desc: When Lori finds out that the golf coach from her dream college is coming to see her play, she develops the yips.

programme.title: E299 - Tango Tangle / Necro-Nom-Nom-Nom-I-Con
programme.desc: Plankton and Karen take dance lessons and quickly become the top of the class. // Equipped with a magical spell book, SpongeBob cooks up chaos in the Krusty Krab kitchen.

programme.title: The Vibe
programme.desc: The Vibe is a 30-minute TV show that runs daily on weekdays on CGTN. The content focuses on exciting new trends, fashion, and cultural topics across a range of disciplines both in China and abroad. The host presents various culture-related topics in a fun way while also doing some in-depth analysis to give viewers a fuller picture as to what is happening, and why it matters.

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: 只有最頂層的0.1%人口可住在天空城堡——一個獨特的住宅社區。在上流社會的「SKY Castle」中更住著一群欲扶助丈夫事業和培育子女成為二代貴族的貴婦。然而，這些貴婦都有一個秘密不能告訴任何人。她們的財富、榮譽和最重要的權力鬥爭從現在開始！

programme.title: Tabing Ilog
programme.desc: Eight teenagers struggling to find themselves and their true purpose. All things lead and build up to form friendship and love which will transform them for the rest of their lives.

programme.title: Linlang
programme.desc: Victor Lualhati, a former boxer turned seaman, discovers signs of his wife Juliana's infidelity and begins a personal investigation. As he digs deeper, Victor uncovers a web of deception involving powerful figures and family secrets, realizing that the affair is only part of a much larger and more dangerous conspiracy.

programme.title: Incognito
programme.desc: Private Military Contractors (PMCs) engage in high-stakes tasks daily, with many skilled Filipino soldiers involved. Incognito follows ex-soldiers on covert missions, blending intense action with themes of honor, love, and redemption.

programme.title: It's Showtime Live[Live]
programme.desc: The venue for Pinoys to strut and display their unique talents for all the world to see. Led by a powerhouse cast of popular celebrities - Vhong Navarro, Anne Curtis, Ogie Alcasid, Karylle, Jhong Hilario and Vice Ganda to name a few.

programme.title: The Alibi[Live]
programme.desc: Vincent, an heir to a news empire, gets accused of killing his rival, Walter. To protect his reputation, he hires Stella, an escort with her own haunted past, to pose as his alibi. What begins as a transactional arrangement soon becomes dangerously real as their shared wounds and ambitions draw them together. But when they uncover the truth, the two are compelled to confront their true feelings.

programme.title: Slam:2026
programme.desc: Three contestants compete on arrow-word grids that they try to fill in by finding the answers to the given clues. But to access the clues, they must first answer questions with a very particular characteristic: the answer is always a letter.

programme.title: Meurtres En Pays Catalan
programme.desc: Speleologists discover the body of a woman staged in a strange manner, surrounded by snakes. Two days later, a second victim is found in the same circumstances. An investigation in which Inspector Lionel Orphus must work alongside his first love, Eleonore Vallance.

programme.title: Rentrons
programme.desc: In a village in northern Algeria, Nouria and Abdel, a Frenchman who lives and works there, are friends. Following a bet, they set off on a moped trip along the Mediterranean coast. Their goal: to board a boat that will take them back to France.

programme.title: E4 - Popularity Becomes You
programme.desc: While Francis is preparing his trip, Julietta is organising the house for the arrival of her cousin Amanda. Ricardo and Doris go through a rough patch.

programme.title: It's A Mad Mad Mad World
programme.desc: News reporter Bill and his wife live in a public housing flat with their 3 daughters. Their dream is to get rich someday. When Lady Luck comes knocking on their door one day and they win the first prize of the local lottery, Mark Six, all hell break loose...

programme.title: The Movie Star Says -Sandra Ng
programme.desc: Known as the 'Queen of Comedy', Sandra Ng as an actress has spanned across generations, allowing her to witness the ups and downs of Hong Kong films over decades. Looking back onto the golden age of Hong Kong cinema, Ng confessed that comedies in the old days were much more simple and straight forward. Stepping into the millennium, recession in film industry somehow inspired her to produce own masterpieces of the era. With her youth dedicated to the Hong Kong cinema, how does she feel about lifelong career as an actress, a director and a producer?

programme.title: Legendary Award Winners: The Last Message
programme.desc: Our story begins in the Hang Seng Sanitarium, which has a quite amount of crazy people. Ah Tim is a handy man there and Li is a nurse. Ah Tim has the greatest enthusiasm in his work, especially when he combs through the remains of the deceased and divests them of worldly items like gold fillings. However, his enterprise is spotted by Li, therefore, he has to make it a profit sharing venture. Later on, with the arrival of old Cheng, big fortune comes too. The two is now planning seriously how to get all the valuables from the big guy. However...

programme.title: The Duel
programme.desc: The story is set in the Ming dynasty. 'Holy Sword' requests a fight with secret agent 009's friend 'God of Sword' to decide the world's best swordsman. During the contest on the roof of the Forbidden City, 009 realises that 'Holy Sword' has sent a double to fight in his place, while he plans to assassinate the emperor. 'Holy Sword' finds himself surrounded by thousands of palace guards but is rescued by 'God of Sword', who wants to complete their championship...

programme.title: E78
programme.desc: Stay in the know with what's happening this morning. ABC News brings you up-to-the-minute news to fuel your daily conversations so you can stay connected and follow the discussion across the day. Presented by Gemma Veness.

programme.title: E10 - Lost (Part 1) Celine Cremer
programme.desc: Belgian backpacker Celine Cremer was on the trip of a lifetime but on a hike in Tasmania she took a wrong turn and was never seen again. More than two years later a group of friends and volunteers set out looking for answers.
